title: Morning Bedroom Cinematic Lifestyle Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Morning Bedroom Cinematic Lifestyle Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Subject: adult East Asian woman in an opaque cream knit top and high-waisted midi skirt, calm clean natural look appears as the adult East Asian lifestyle portrait subject, with natural facial features, calm clean expression, realistic skin texture, tasteful body-line presentation, and non-explicit styling. Scene: morning bedroom beside a made white bed and sheer curtains, soft window light, tasteful shoulder and waist line, non-explicit composition creates the clean morning bedroom setting with white bedding, sheer curtains, soft window light, minimal background, and a restrained cinematic everyday mood. Composition: Fixed vertical lifestyle portrait composition: adult subject near the bed and curtains, soft morning light shaping shoulder and waist line, stable natural pose, half-body to thigh framing when appropriate, clean negative space, and a calm lived-in bedroom atmosphere. Signature Elements: Morning bedroom window, white bed, sheer curtains, soft cinematic stillness, clean natural adult subject, tasteful shoulder and waist line, minimal room setting, and restrained everyday realism. Style: Realistic sensual lifestyle portrait translated into public-safe cinematic everyday photography: quiet, soft, restrained, natural, clean, emotionally subtle, and not studio-glamour or CG illustration. Color Palette: Cream, ivory, white bedding, pale gray curtains, warm skin tones, soft cool morning light, gentle beige shadows, and low-saturation bedroom neutrals. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Opaque knit, cardigan, skirt or trousers, white bedsheet fabric, sheer curtain texture, soft bedroom textiles, natural hair detail, and realistic skin texture. Restrictions: Use an adult subject only. Keep styling tasteful, covered, and non-explicit.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
